case_title: RUN BIN HONG et al VS. RITA ANN BAGNULO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HONG, RUN BIN HONG, LI LI XIAO AS TO DEFENDANT BAGNULO, RITA ANN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HONG, RUN BIN HONG, LI LI XIAO AS TO DEFENDANT BAGNULO, RITA ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HONG, RUN BIN HONG, LI LI XIAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAGNULO, RITA ANN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,085.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF $1000.00 FOR EACH PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HONG, RUN BIN HONG, LI LI XIAO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-09-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAGNULO, RITA ANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. SAN ONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/MANDARIN - MANDARIN/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFFS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
